name: Gemma Thinking Fix
content:
"""
Title: Gemma Reasoning Pipeline Filter
Description: Standardizes Gemma 4's proprietary reasoning tokens into UI-compatible tags.

This filter performs high-performance stream interception to map native 
channel tokens to the <think> format used by modern frontends. It implements 
stateful buffering to maintain integrity across fragmented network packets.
"""

import re
from typing import Optional, Dict, Any, List
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

# Control Token Definitions
GEMMA_THOUGHT_OPEN = "<|channel>thought"
GEMMA_THOUGHT_CLOSE = "<channel|>"
UI_THINK_OPEN = "<think>"
UI_THINK_CLOSE = "</think>"

# Compiled regex for extraneous sequence removal
CLEANUP_PATTERN = re.compile(
    r"<\|turn\>[^\n]*\n?|<turn\|>|<\|think\|>|<bos>|<eos>"
)

class Filter:
    class Valves(BaseModel):
        enabled_for_models: str = Field(
            default="gemma",
            description="Substrings to trigger filter application (comma-separated).",
        )

    def __init__(self):
        self.valves = self.Valves()
        self._stream_buffer = ""

    def _is_target_model(self, model_id: str) -> bool:
        if not model_id:
            return False
        targets = [t.strip().lower() for t in self.valves.enabled_for_models.split(",")]
        return any(t in model_id.lower() for t in targets if t)

    def inlet(self, body: Dict[str, Any], __user__: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        if not self._is_target_model(body.get("model", "")):
            return body

        self._stream_buffer = ""
        
        # Ensure frontend reasoning detection defaults take precedence
        params = body.get("metadata", {}).get("params", {})
        if "reasoning_tags" in params:
            params.pop("reasoning_tags")
            
        return body

    def stream(self, event: Dict[str, Any], __user__: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        choices = event.get("choices", [])
        if not choices:
            return event

        delta = choices[0].get("delta", {})
        incoming_text = delta.get("content", "")
        if not incoming_text:
            return event

        # 1. Strip raw control artifacts
        sanitized_chunk = CLEANUP_PATTERN.sub("", incoming_text)

        # 2. Reconstruct from buffer to handle split tokens across packets
        working_string = self._stream_buffer + sanitized_chunk
        self._stream_buffer = ""

        # 3. Perform token translation
        working_string = working_string.replace(GEMMA_THOUGHT_OPEN, UI_THINK_OPEN)
        working_string = working_string.replace(GEMMA_THOUGHT_CLOSE, UI_THINK_CLOSE)

        # 4. Handle partial token look-ahead
        # We identify if the string ends with a prefix of a known control token
        potential_tokens = [GEMMA_THOUGHT_OPEN, GEMMA_THOUGHT_CLOSE, "<", "<|"]
        for token in potential_tokens:
            for i in range(len(token), 0, -1):
                prefix = token[:i]
                if working_string.endswith(prefix):
                    self._stream_buffer = working_string[-len(prefix):]
                    working_string = working_string[:-len(prefix)]
                    break
            if self._stream_buffer:
                break

        delta["content"] = working_string
        return event

    def outlet(self, body: Dict[str, Any], __user__: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        if not self._is_target_model(body.get("model", "")):
            return body

        messages = body.get("messages", [])
        if not messages or messages[-1].get("role") != "assistant":
            return body

        last_msg = messages[-1]
        content = last_msg.get("content", "")

        if isinstance(content, str):
            # Final pass to ensure stored history is clean
            cleaned_content = CLEANUP_PATTERN.sub("", content).strip()
            if cleaned_content != content:
                last_msg["content"] = cleaned_content

        return body",
  "meta": {
    "description": "Standardizes Gemma 4 reasoning tokens for Open WebUI",
    "manifest": {
      "title": "Gemma Thinking Fix",
      "description": "Intercepts and translates <|channel>thought tokens to <think> tags for native reasoning UI support.",
      "author": "Engineering",
      "version": "1.0.0"
    },
    "type": "filter"
  },
  "is_active": true,
  "is_global": false
}
